nodes.label: .`Privacy and Support section is displayed for DM conversation`()
.`action button row displays all five action buttons`()
.`action button row shows Unmute label when conversation is muted`()
.`action button row shows Mute label when conversation is not muted`()
.`displays Active now when user is online`()
.`displays last active time when user is offline`()
.`does not display status text when offline and no last active time`()
.`shared media section is displayed when media is available`()
.`shared media section is hidden when no media is available`()
